zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna Warre於大約1518年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特奧爾哈德 波特曼時，她的父親Sir William Richard Warre17歲，母親Lady Joan Stourton16歲。她於1529年與Thomas Michell在英國薩默塞特奧爾哈德 波特曼結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1539年12月13日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特卡寧頓享年22歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna Warre于大约1518年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特奧爾哈德 波特曼时，她的父亲Sir William Richard Warre17岁，母亲Lady Joan Stourton16岁。她于1529年与Thomas Michell在英国薩默塞特奧爾哈德 波特曼结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1539年12月13日在英国英格兰薩默塞特卡寧頓享年22岁。

nameMeanings.name: Warre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Warr
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname for a warrior, usually from Norman French were, werre, waire, warre (central French guerre) ‘war, battle’, and short for de la werre (de la guerre, see Delaware ), literally ‘(man) of the war’, a construction paralleled in de la Bataille (see Battle ). Occasionally it is a shortened form of Old French werreur ‘warrior’.

variants.name: Ware
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by or looked after a dam or weir on a river (from Old English wær, wer, Middle English war(e), warre, wer(e), werre ‘weir’), or a habitational name from a place called with this word, such as Weare (Somerset), Weare Giffard (Devon), or Ware (Hertfordshire).
topographic name for someone who lived by a horse pond or fish pond, from Anglo-Norman French, Middle English wayour, which became early modern English ware, wear.

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna Warre was born about 1518, in Orchard Portman, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Richard Warre, was 17 and her mother, Lady Joan Stourton, was 16. She married Thomas Michell in 1529, in Orchard Portman, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 13 December 1539, in Cannington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 22.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna Warre est née environ 1518, à Orchard Portman, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Richard Warre, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan Stourton, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Michell en 1529, à Orchard Portman, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 13 décembre 1539, à Cannington, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 22 ans.

Lei sposato Thomas Michell nel 1529, nel Orchard Portman, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 13 dicembre 1539, nel Cannington, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 22 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Warre(이)가 대략 1518년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 오처드 포트먼에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Richard Warre(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Joan Stourton(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1529년 영국 서머세트 오처드 포트먼에서 Thomas Michell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1539년 12월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 캔잉턴에서 22세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna Warre родилась около 1518 г. в местности орчард портман, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Richard Warre было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan Stourton, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Michell в 1529 г. в местности орчард портман, сомирсет, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 13 декабря 1539 г. в местности каннингтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 22 лет.
